column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for parts of Hillsborough County. Download the ABC Action News App for the latest.
These feeder bands well after storms “eye” has passed, are crazy strong still.
Is it near Apollo beach? Wish I had a live radar so I could see!
it’s been crazy here. Y’all here or on the coast?
both at the moment. I’m here and Rog went check on the coast. So much water with this one. Y’all stay safe!
you stay safe too. Been praying for you. When do Tammy and Ron get back? Been praying for them too
